titles.en: Chapter on the Blessing and Omen of a Woman

text: 4359 - رُوِيَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ بُكَيْرٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "مِنْ بَرَكَةِ اَلْمَرْأَةِ خِفَّةُ مَئُونَتِهَا وَ تَيْسِيرُ وِلاَدَتِهَا وَ مِنْ شُؤْمِهَا شِدَّةُ مَئُونَتِهَا وَ تَعْسِيرُ وِلاَدَتِهَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4359 - It is narrated from Abdullah ibn Bukayr, from Muhammad ibn Muslim, that Abu Abdillah (as) said:
"Among the blessings of a woman are the lightness of her expenses and the ease of her childbirth. And among her misfortunes are the heaviness of her expenses and the difficulty of her childbirth."

text: 4360 - وَ رُوِيَ: "أَنَّ مِنْ بَرَكَةِ اَلْمَرْأَةِ قِلَّةَ مَهْرِهَا وَ مِنْ شُؤْمِهَا كَثْرَةَ مَهْرِهَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4360 - It is narrated: "Among the blessings of a woman is the smallness of her dowry, and among her misfortunes is the largeness of her dowry."

text: 4361 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "تَزَوَّجُوا اَلزُّرْقَ فَإِنَّ فِيهِنَّ اَلْبَرَكَةَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4361 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said: "Marry women with blue eyes, for indeed there is blessing in them."
